title: Maxillariella lawrenceana
taxonomy: Maxillariella lawrenceana is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that is native to Central and South America. Maxillariella lawrenceana is classified as a member of the genus Maxillariella, which is part of the subtribe Maxillariinae. The subtribe Maxillariinae is further classified under the tribe Cymbidieae. This classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and helps to group similar species together.
